subcodes.title: Words to the friends spoken in Dec. 1907
subcodes.first_line: This man thinks that he is uprooting the Tree of the Cause and does not see that he is promoting the Divine Faith. The Ancient Beauty has stated, “Whosoever arises to harm us is indeed a teacher of the Cause
subcodes.first_line_orig: این شخص بخیال خودش در صدد قلع و قمع شجره مبارکه بر آمده ولی خودش نمیداند که منادی امر الله
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @growth of the Cause, @martyrs and martyrdom, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar]
